```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>

#include <span>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
};

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(std::span<uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);

    NetworkPacket packet;

    stream >> packet.packet_id;
    stream >> hexi::prefixed(packet.username);
    stream >> hexi::prefixed(packet.scores);
    stream >> hexi::null_terminated(packet.metadata);

    // Skip any remaining padding bytes
    stream.skip(buffer.size() - stream.total_read());

    return packet;
}

struct PacketInfo {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string_view username;
};

    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);

    PacketInfo info;

    // Use span() for packet_id (first 4 bytes)
    info.packet_id = *stream.span<uint32_t>(1);

    // Read username using prefixed adaptor to get a string_view
    stream >> hexi::prefixed(info.username);

    // Skip the scores vector without reading its elements
    uint32_t count;
    stream >> count;
    stream.skip(count * sizeof(uint32_t));

    return info;
}
```
